Headline: #81 Lawrence Temporary Reroute near Lawrence/Avandale
ShortDescription: 81 Lawrence buses temp. rerouted: due to, police activity near Lawrence/Avandale.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#81 Lawrence buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions  due to police activity near Lawrence/Avandale.

Eastbound buses will operate via Jefferson Park, Milwaukee, Montrose, Clarendon and Lawrence including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Montrose, Milwaukee and Jefferson Park.

Allow extra travel time.
